entry.title: Love Language
entry.summary:
Author: IrishMum1710

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,030Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 0

Summary: Buck rescues a cat from a house fire. Unfortunately, the collapsing ceiling gives him a concussion. Even more unfortunately, the concussion gives him a British accent. The 118 think it's hilarious. Buck uses it to flirt with Eddie. Nobody is having a normal time. Or: Buck develops Foreign Accent Syndrome and accidentally falls in love with his best friend.

entry.title: My advice is always ruin the friendship (Better that than regret it for all time)
entry.summary:
Author: Buddie_Girl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,600Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 387

Summary: He looked down, shocked to see Christopher’s number displayed across his screen. They had texted occasionally, but it had been over six years since they last saw each other, and since Christopher never called him, something was clearly wrong. “Chris?” “Hey Buck, I know it's been a while, and I’m sorry to be so blunt, but Dad was hurt in a fire six weeks ago and has been in a coma ever since.” The color drains from Buck’s face. “I begged them to let him fight, but they won’t listen. Grandma and Abuelo, they want to…” He doesn’t let Christopher finish, “Christopher, is your dad dead?” He braces himself for the answer. It may have been over six years, but deep down, Buck’s feelings for his former partner have never changed. “No, because they aren’t in Dad’s power of attorney, you are.” Christopher tells him, “They tried to hide his will, but when they suggested pulling the plug, the hospital contacted the fire station that Dad works at, just to verify, and his captain turned it over. They couldn’t remove life support because they need you to sign off. I need you too…” Buck doesn’t even hear the last part as he’s sucked into his own thoughts.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Franklin Mountains
entry.summary:
Author: urineblondie

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,775Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: “We just don’t see a lot of your kind around here” said the son.“My kind? What is that supposed to mean” asked the new hire giving him a confused smile.“You know… pretty boys” answered the other.“You’re pretty handsome yourself” said Buck.“I didn’t say handsome, did I?”Rude.“Well, you’ll definitely see more of me, so get used to it” sassed the pretty boy.“Let’s see how long you’ll last” —Or: Buck had just finished the Navy Seals training and was left disappointed and kind of lost. He needed a fresh start. He found himself in El Paso and got hired to work on the Diaz’ family ranch.

entry.summary:
Author: hellanovers

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,058Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: Eddie could hear the music from outside the house, and he could see Buck, dancing around the kitchen while cleaning the dishes. Eddie smiled to himself. Or, Eddie comes home from the gym to a dancing Buckley, and starts dancing with him.

entry.title: There's No You Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: 79KJ01

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,116Chapters: 11/30Kudos: 32

Summary: “Where are you driving from?” Eddie asked, his mouth moving before he could stop it, his brain deciding that awkward small talk was infinitely safer than just standing there vibrating with nervous energy. “East,” the guy replied with a casual, fluid roll of his broad shoulders. “Farther than I wanted to be, honestly. And definitely longer than I originally planned.” Before the army, before Los Angeles, and long before the 118, there was a dusty gas station on the edge of El Paso, a broken-down Jeep with Pennsylvania plates, and a stranger named Evan. For years, they were each other's entire world, surviving basic training, AIT, and a grueling deployment side-by-side. But a devastating wave of silence and a massive misunderstanding tore them apart, leaving behind a deep, soul-cutting ache and a history neither of them ever truly moved on from. Now, the past has finally caught up to the present. Standing under the harsh fluorescent lights of Station 118, Eddie and Evan are forced to navigate the wreckage of the life they left behind—and the terrifying truth of everything they never stopped running from.

entry.title: The Convenience Marriage...or is it?
entry.summary:
Author: ToastyMoon2876

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,404Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 13

Summary: This Story is about Buck and Eddie(Buddie). Eddie is now helping Buck with Theo as they are now both single Fathers.Of course since Theo is in the foster system there are a lot of issues when it comes to later on adopting him and even keeping him in general.Eddie of course wants to help Buck so that he keeps Theo.So what does Eddie do?Of course!like any best friend would...He gets down on one knee and proposes...

entry.title: “Friends with Benefits”
entry.summary:
Author: EideticMoose

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,111Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 111

Summary: ‘“Oh haha funny thing about that! Eddie and I have started helping each other out so no problems there,” he chuckled, rubbing the back of his neck. Eddie’s face turned a particularly vibrant shade of tomato. Hen’s jaw dropped. Bobby turned white, eyes somehow locked at 1000 yards. Ravi, who had been very carefully and silently avoiding this entire situation got up and left, “Ew ew ew don’t tell me this. I regret asking,” Chimney’s arms swinging up to cover his face. “Just casual. Friends with benefits deal,” Eddie tried to calm the rapidly deteriorating situation. “Let’s discuss something more workplace appropriate-“ Bobby tried. “Let me get this straight.” Hen cut off any attempt to change the subject. “You are sleeping, living, raising children, cuddling and even grocery shopping together, and you are claiming to be just friends with benefits,” “Well obviously,” Buck scoffed, rolling his eyes.’ Buck and Eddie reveal they have been sleeping together but aren’t in a relationship. Nearly killing everyone in a 5 mile radius.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Ghost and Impulse
entry.summary:
Author: shallythunder

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,024Chapters: 10/27Kudos: 8

Summary: After Buck gets hit by the lightning strike, he develops superpowers—a searing lightning bolt and the ability to fly. As he learns about his powers, and finds out Eddie has them too, they recruit Hen as their mentor, all while an honest-to-goodness supervillain blasts into town and threatens to shut off the city’s water supply in a desperate attempt to win back the attention of the President. Can Buck, who’s dedicated his life to saving people, actually hurt someone, even if he is a villain?

entry.title: just a little bit of your heart (is all I'm asking for)
entry.summary:
Author: dbolterstar

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 371,860Chapters: 39/55Kudos: 408

Summary: “Does this change a thing between us?” Buck asks, his voice low, hands still framing Eddie’s face. He can feel the unsteady breaths leaving Eddie’s lips, warm against his own. Eddie looks wrecked. His cheeks are flushed, lips red and kiss-swollen, his glassy eyes locked on Buck’s mouth like it’s the only thing he can see. He looks as hungry as Buck feels. Buck feels Eddie’s fingers trace along his arms, squeezing just enough to leave his skin tingling. “I don’t know.” It’s not a yes—Buck’s not even sure he wants to hear a yes. But it’s so much better than the rejection Eddie threw at him before. “Alright,” Buck exhales, nodding like it’s nothing, even though it feels massive. Then he surges forward, catching Eddie’s mouth in his again. They don’t stop. Can’t. Their mouths are locked together like they’re trying to breathe each other in, like letting go for even a second would be unbearable.or; Eddie’s shame torments him. Buck would rather have a piece of Eddie than nothing at all. Miscommunication is their biggest enemy. Infidelity turns into their savior… or ends up being the thing that destroys them?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: End of the Beginning
entry.summary:
Author: NocturneIgnis00

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,803Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

Summary: For a long time, Eddie Díaz felt like he was completely standing still. Caught in a ghost town of his own past, he found himself wandering through a maze of his own suffocating emotions. And just like everything else in his life, it all inevitably led back to Buck. To the piercing blue of his eyes. To the raw warmth of his joyful smile. Eddie knows he cannot afford to lose him—and he is willing to do whatever it takes to keep him safe, even if it costs him his own life.***Set after Season 9. When Eddie is critically injured during a catastrophic rescue operation, Buck is forced to navigate the harrowing wreckage of the aftermath, realizing that a universe without Eddie is a reality he is completely unequipped to face.***English is not my first language, but I am trying my absolute best with this story! I really hope you guys enjoy it. Comments and kudos are always highly appreciated! <3

entry.title: "I'll take a chance on leaving, It's that or stay and die"
entry.summary:
Author: Jamez_of_calamity

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,228Chapters: 3/20Kudos: 50

Summary: What if Buck and Eddie had Chris, what if buck ran away stifled by the expectations of motherhood drowning raising a baby alone, what if he then transitioned traveled the world before finding himself at the 118, what if Eddie shows up not recognizing him not knowing he's staring at his son's other fatherWhat if Eddie and Buck had Chris, what if Eddie got a girl he barely knew pregnant, what if they where pressured to keep it, what if he joins the army abandoning her, what if she leaves with just a note and a son for him to raise alone, what if Eddie joins the 118 not knowing he's staring at his son's other father- or a alternate universe where Buck takes Shannons place in the story, angst and chaos ensue

entry.title: Do The Mountains Call Your Name Louder Than I Did?
entry.summary:
Author: Lexicloud

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,756Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 36

Summary: Buck is leaving, he never thought he would, let alone want to. But sometimes you have to give up a lot to find the peace and happiness you deserve. He always thought everyone leaves, nobody stays and now he understands why, sometimes you have to. It was he's turn to make the hard choice, he's turn for another adventure, he's turn to do something for himself. Buck was done giving up his joy and peace for others, especially when they wouldn't do the same. He was done letting others decide who he was, done being talk down to, like he hasn't grown and changed. He was scared, excited, but ready. Eddie thought he would come back and would let himself have the joy in his life for the first time, he thought this was the beginning to something real and honest not just to himself but to people in life. He was gay and proud and ready to share his truth, but most importantly ready to admit he had fallen in love with his best friend. But nothing went as planned....   or Buck leaves to start a new life in Switzerland, and years will go by before Eddie and Buck make it back to each other with new challenges and new heartbreaks.

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 230,659Chapters: 56/?Kudos: 143

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love.The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath.He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt.So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence. It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth.⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

entry.title: read receipt
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,109Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 701

Summary: "What— what do you see?" "I see," Eddie says, measured, careful, "someone who looks like he wanted somebody to see him like that." Buck's whole body goes hot. "And I'm trying to decide," Eddie continues, slower now, his breath heavier, "whether I'm allowed to be that somebody." The hand on Buck's thigh has migrated upward. He notices it three seconds after it happens, his palm now resting flat against his own stomach where his shirt has rucked up, fingers splayed across the skin. The touch of his own hand on his own body in this context is sending a current up his spine that he is, evidently, helpless to stop. "Eddie." Buck's voice cracks. "Are you— are you jerking off to my photo?" The pause is brief but loaded, and when Eddie answers it’s barely recognizable, every word landing somewhere in the south of Buck's body with a measurable physical impact. "You send me a picture like that, Buck. What am I supposed to do?" Or,Buck wins a boudoir photoshoot giveaway. Eddie reaps the benefits. Or,Buck accidentally sends his nudes to Eddie.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Postcards From LA
entry.summary:
Author: catniss_37

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,388Chapters: 6/11Kudos: 43

Summary: Eddie catches that redeye flight back to El Paso and returns to life in Texas with Christopher, and everything is as it should be. It's different and juggling Christopher, basic training, his grief is hard, and adapting to living with his parents right there to question his every move is complicated, but here with Christopher is where he's meant to be. Right? But when Eddie gets a postcard in the mail from one Evan "Buck" Buckley, suddenly he's reminded that maybe everything isn't as fine as it seems and that everything important isn't just here in Texas.
